title: Booloo
writer: Clyde E. Elliott, Robert E. Welsh, Andjar Asmara
actors: Colin Tapley, Jayne Regan, Mamo Clark
plot: A young stiff-upper-lipped British officer, Robert Rogers, writes a book about a white tiger and sacrifices of native girls by the Sakai tribe in Malaya. But the critics ridicule the book. Since it book was based on stories Robert...
